name: Pier 39
summary_en: Archive documents cover Pier 39 as a Port of San Francisco property and visitor destination, including a 1987 northern waterfront findings report calling it a major destination, a Port Commission agenda noting it opened on October 4, 1978, a draft environmental impact report for the Underwater World aquarium at Pier 39, and Arts Commission records on building revisions and ticket-kiosk designs. Port minutes record the Pier 39 Limited Partnership lease and a project partly funded by Pier 39/Underwater World. The pier is operated by the Port of San Francisco, whose FY2025 budget line is $156M; no place-specific city contract appears in this data.
